focus: Adversarial verify of F-A6-01 (auto-fix default-ON coverage gap) — exhaustive *.vitest.ts grep for any test exercising advisory mode + SPECKIT_QUALITY_AUTO_FIX unset (default-true) end-to-end

findingDetails.title: Integrated production auto-fix path (advisory mode + env unset → default-true OR-branch → auto-fix engages end-to-end) is uncovered; the two OR-operands are only verified in isolation
findingDetails.evidence: Repo-wide grep: SPECKIT_QUALITY_AUTO_FIX in 3 vitest files, isQualityAutoFixEnabled in 1 (search-flags), runQualityLoop in 6 (4 mock it), autoFixEnabled in 0. NEW evidence iter-007 missed: search-flags.vitest.ts:254 asserts isQualityAutoFixEnabled()===true with env UNSET (default-true operand covered in isolation); handler-memory-save.vitest.ts:1122 asserts production dispatch passes mode:'advisory' to runQualityLoop (but as a SPY at line 1113, so real OR-resolution never runs). rollout-policy.vitest.ts has ZERO quality/auto-fix refs. Every REAL runQualityLoop auto-fix execution forces mode:'full-auto' or env=false — so the integrated path (advisory+unset → auto-fix engages) is never run in one test.
findingDetails.recommendation: Add one quality-loop.vitest.ts test calling the REAL runQualityLoop with low-quality content, mode omitted, and SPECKIT_QUALITY_AUTO_FIX unset, asserting auto-fix engages (content mutated / retried).
findingDetails.scopeProof: All cited test files in diff range a9e9bdb0a5^..HEAD; OR-branch is literal production code at quality-loop.ts:591; gap proven by exhaustive grep+read of all 6 runQualityLoop callers + search-flags + rollout-policy.

verdict.evidence: tests/search-flags.vitest.ts:252-254 (default-true operand unit-covered, env unset) + tests/handler-memory-save.vitest.ts:1122 (advisory-mode dispatch asserted, runQualityLoop spied at :1113) partially satisfy iter-007's downgradeTrigger; rollout-policy.vitest.ts ruled out (zero refs). Integrated end-to-end path still absent (all real auto-fix runs force full-auto/env-false; handler callers mock runQualityLoop), so residual gap preserved as P2 advisory not silent pass.

noveltyJustification: No new findings; one refinement (P1→P2 downgrade of F-A6-01). weightedRefinement = 0.5 × P1-weight(5) = 2.5; weightedTotal = refined finding full weight 5; ratio = 2.5/5 = 0.50. Adversarial verify discovered isolation coverage iter-007 missed (search-flags.vitest.ts:254, handler-memory-save.vitest.ts:1122) and ruled out rollout-policy as a coverage source.
traceabilityChecks: F-A6-01 carried from iter-007 P1; downgradeTrigger (search-flags/rollout-policy unit suites) adversarially resolved
explicit parallel-dispatch iteration number 14 governs over JSONL-derive rule

integrationEvidence.check: re-confirmed mode='advisory' default (line 590) and autoFixEnabled = mode==='full-auto' || isQualityAutoFixEnabled() (line 591) at HEAD
production dispatch asserts mode:'advisory' but runQualityLoop is spied (line 1113), so integrated OR-resolution is not executed

edgeCases: parallel-dispatch iteration numbering: explicit dispatch 14 governs; no shared-state mutation
partial refutation not full: OR-operands covered in isolation but integrated path absent → P2 downgrade, residual preserved
mock-vs-real: advisory-mode assertion uses a spy, not end-to-end coverage
ruledOut: F-A6-01 'ZERO coverage' framing (partially refuted: search-flags.vitest.ts:254 + handler-memory-save.vitest.ts:1122 cover the operands in isolation)
rollout-policy.vitest.ts as a coverage source (zero quality/auto-fix references)
any hidden integrated test elsewhere (repo-wide runQualityLoop grep = 6 files exhaustive; autoFixEnabled = 0 files)
